mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address, receiver_name, receiver_phone, remark, payment_method, pay_time, delivery_time, estimated_delivery_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM tb_order ORDER BY create_time DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order (order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address, receiver_name, receiver_phone, remark, payment_method, pay_time, delivery_time, estimated_delivery_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{address}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{remark}, #{paymentMethod}, #{payTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deliveryTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
